This has \textbf{bold}, \emph{italic}, \texttt{code}, and \sout{strikethrough} text.

Also \textsuperscript{super} and \textsubscript{sub} and \textsc{Small Caps}.

A link: \href{https://example.com}{Example} and a URL: \url{https://example.com}.

Citations: \cite{smith2020} and \citet{jones2021}.
